project_type: Next.js 16 multi-tenant SaaS CRM with Drizzle ORM and PostgreSQL
test_framework: vitest with tests/ directory, environment: node, pattern: tests/**/*.test.ts
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx vitest run to execute unit tests 2. Run TypeScript compilation check with npx tsc --noEmit
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode, Node 22. No running database available so tests must mock DB calls.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns, use Drizzle ORM for DB, Zod for validation, Next.js App Router for routes
key_patterns: Plan definitions in lib/plans/plan-definitions.ts (PlanDefinition interface). AI token gating in lib/ai/common.ts via checkTokenAndLimits(). Usage tracking per-tenant via lib/usage/tracker.ts. Monthly aggregates in aiUsageAggregated table. Tenant token limits in tenant_token_limits table. Super admin pages in app/superadmin/. API routes in app/api/superadmin/. Drizzle schema files in drizzle/schema/. Schema index exports all from drizzle/schema/index.ts.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js pages and API routes | lib/ - shared logic (ai/, plans/, usage/, auth/) | drizzle/schema/ - DB schema definitions | components/ - React components | tests/ - vitest test files
